text.sculksickness.infected_by.break_scu: §3§lStrange hums§r start to irradiate your ears... Stage: §31
text.sculksickness.infected_by.entity_at: As the creature attacks, a §3§lstrange feeling§r starts overcome you... Stage: §31
text.sculksickness.infected_by.sculk_blo: §3§lStrange spores§r seemingly dissolve into your skin... Stage: §31
text.sculksickness.infected_by.eat_vile_: As you eat the §3§lVile Herb§r, nausea sets in... Stage: §31
text.sculksickness.cured_by.eat_ambrosia: As you eat the §5§lAmbrosia Herb§r, a sense of calmness overtakes you... You are §5cured
text.sculksickness.cured_by.effect: As you start to feel the effects of the §5§lpotion§r, a sense of calmness overtakes you... You are §5cured

advancement.sculksickness.diseased.title: Enlightenment
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.descr: Find the source of the Sculk Sickness.. The Deep Dark.
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.title: §3Diseased
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.descr: Become infected with the mysterious Sculk Sickness. Watch out, as it acts fast.
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.title: Time to Pestle!
§3A Reverberating Upgrade...
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.descr: Craft a Mortar & Echo, useful for developing the cure.
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.title: §3Dust of Whispers
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.descr: Obtain Echo Dust, created from grinding up Echo Shards.
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.title: §3Sculk Harvester
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.descr: Craft some Echo Shears to garner some loot from Sculk.
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.title: §4§l§oYou Monster...
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.descr: Kill an Axolotl, unfortunately it is necessary.
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.title: §3Echoing Calcium
§3Fruit of the Bloom
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.descr: Obtain Bloom Fruits, a curious food item.
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.title: §3How to Stay Alive 101
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.descr: Brew a Potion of the Resonant Deep from a Bloom Fruit.
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.title: Was it Worth it?
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.descr: Brew a Revitalization Potion from an axolotl leg.
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.title: §3A Development..?
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.descr: Craft a Vile Herb, don't eat it!
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.title: §3§oYuck!
§3Chemical Warfare
§5The Cure!
§5Immunity at Last
advancement.sculksickness.diseased.descr: Brew a Sculk Immunity potion from the Ambrosia Herb.
